evals.name: audit-service-row
evals.prompt: Run /qovery-ui audit on the file at .agents/skills/qovery-ui/evals/inputs/audit-input.tsx. Output the audit findings in the table format described by the skill.
evals.expected_output: Markdown table with severity-labeled findings catching: raw Tailwind palette colors (text-green-500/yellow-500/red-500), hardcoded hex (#7c3aed), inline style usage, gap-5/p-5 off-grid spacing, <Tag> deprecated component, <ButtonPrimitive> internal primitive, raw <button> with custom svg instead of shared Button + Icon, missing aria-label on icon-only delete button, suppressed focus ring (focus:outline-none), border-neutral-300 raw scale.

evals.name: polish-environment-card
evals.prompt: Run /qovery-ui polish on the file at .agents/skills/qovery-ui/evals/inputs/polish-input.tsx. Output a Before / After / Why table of refinements.
evals.expected_output: Before/After/Why table flagging: p-5 (off-grid mid-range), text-neutral-700/600/500 (raw scale, should use semantic tokens text-neutral / text-neutral-subtle), mt-2 + gap-3 redundancy, missing hover state on the clickable card, possibly bg-white → surface token.

evals.name: craft-service-health-card
evals.prompt: Run /qovery-ui craft. I'm designing a new "Service Health Summary" card for the project dashboard. It needs to show: total service count, a breakdown by status (running, degraded, stopped), and the timestamp of the last incident. It's one of three cards in a row, so it must feel compact (not a hero unit). Produce the structured design proposal the skill describes.
evals.expected_output: Structured proposal with: layout skeleton (compact card, not hero), shared component recommendations (Card primitives, StatusChip for status states, semantic surface tokens), typography choices (text-sm default, text-xs for labels, possibly Roboto Mono for numeric counts), semantic color decisions (positive/warning/negative tokens, never raw palette), copy suggestions for heading and the relative-time of the last incident, and a flag if working-memory rule is being stretched.

evals.name: copy-microcopy-rewrite
evals.prompt:
Run /qovery-ui copy. Review and rewrite the following microcopy strings. For each, output a Before / After / Why row.

1. Error toast shown when a deployment fails: "An error occurred"
2. Label above a form input: "ENVIRONMENT NAME"
3. Confirmation button text on a modal that permanently deletes a database: "Confirm"
4. Title of a modal that opens to configure autoscaling rules: "Settings"
5. Empty state heading on the services list when no services exist yet: "No data"
evals.expected_output: Before/After/Why table with rewrites: (1) state what failed + next step (e.g., "Deploy failed. Check the logs for details."); (2) sentence case ("Environment name"); (3) name the destructive action ("Delete database"); (4) name the action ("Configure autoscaling"); (5) friendly + action-oriented ("No services yet" + CTA hint).
